title: How To Uninstall Wuthering Waves Without Missing Hidden Files
content:
Step 1 Prepare Before You Uninstall Wuthering Waves

If you are searching for how to uninstall Wuthering Waves, do one quick check before you click Uninstall. The best method depends on your goal. If you only want to free up storage, a basic removal is usually enough. If you want to fix launcher errors, crashes, or stubborn performance issues, you may need a cleaner wipe later. For Windows apps, Microsoft Support points users to Settings for standard app removal and offers extra troubleshooting when uninstalling fails.

Choose Basic or Clean Uninstall

Think of this as a simple choice. A basic uninstall removes the main app so you can reclaim space fast. A clean uninstall goes further and is more useful when you plan to reinstall because the launcher is broken, the game still crashes, or old files may be causing trouble. If your only goal is storage, keep it simple. If your goal is repair, plan for cleanup.

Check Your Install Source

Before you uninstall Wuthering Waves, confirm where you installed it from. A standalone PC launcher, Epic Games Store, Android device, and iPhone can each use a different removal path. Do not mix them. Official Wuthering Waves notes show the game is available on PC, Android, and iOS, with data-sharing across platforms, which is why your login method matters just as much as the device you are removing it from.

Close the Game and Save What Matters

If you are wondering how to uninstall wuwa without deleting the wrong files, this checklist keeps the process safe and organized.

  1. Close the game completely.

  2. Exit the launcher from the system tray if it is still running.

  3. Open Task Manager only if the game or launcher appears stuck.

  4. Note the install location so you can check it later.

  5. Decide whether you want to keep screenshots or local settings files.

  6. Confirm which login method you used so you know what progress is tied to your account.

A clean uninstall removes more local remnants than a basic uninstall, so save anything you want first.

This small prep step prevents most uninstall mistakes. It also makes the next decision much easier: knowing what will leave your device and what usually stays attached to your account.

Step 2 Understand What Uninstalling Removes

This is the question most readers care about most. If you uninstall Wuthering Waves, you are usually removing the copy stored on your device, not automatically erasing the login-linked data behind it. In the KURO Games Privacy Policy, the company explains that it generates a user ID to associate an account with game data, keeps certain information while an account remains active, and treats erasure or termination as a separate right.

What Gets Removed From Your Device

  • The local game installation on that PC, phone, or tablet.

  • Some app data tied to that specific device.

  • Shortcuts, launcher entries, or app icons linked to the installed copy.

What Usually Stays on Your Account

  • Your account sign-in and account identity.

  • Game progress and other account-linked records tied to that login.

  • Purchase and transaction records associated with the account.

Uninstalling the app or launcher is not the same as deleting an account.

When Local Files Can Still Remain

A normal uninstall does not always clear every local extra. Depending on the platform and removal method, you may still have screenshots saved to the device, settings, cached files, or launcher remnants. KURO Games notes that the game can save images or videos to device storage, and this is one reason personal media may outlast the app itself. On Android, an Android cleanup guide also shows why cache and data may need separate clearing when you want a cleaner reset.

If your real goal is wuthering waves delete account, or you are searching how to delete Wuthering Waves account and how to delete Wuthering Waves completely, check official account settings or support documentation first. The uninstall button handles the local copy. The account side is a different path, and the PC steps depend on where you installed the game.

Step 3 Remove the Standalone PC Install

On a direct Windows install, the safest route begins with Windows itself, not a store library. If you searched for how to uninstall Wuthering Waves on PC and you used the standalone launcher or a direct installer, follow this path. If your copy came from Epic Games Store, do not mix methods. Store-managed installs use their own library controls, and that difference matters.

Uninstall Through Windows Apps

The clearest starting point is the Windows app list. Microsoft Support shows that Windows 11 uses Start > Settings > Apps > Installed apps, while Windows 10 uses Start > Settings > Apps > Apps & features. If the entry will not uninstall there, Control Panel is the usual fallback.

  1. Open Start, then go to Settings and the Apps section for your version of Windows.

  2. Find Wuthering Waves or its standalone launcher in the installed app list.

  3. Select the app entry and choose Uninstall.

  4. Follow the on-screen prompts until Windows reports the removal is complete.

  5. If Settings does not remove it, open Control Panel, then Programs and Features, find the same entry, and select Uninstall.

  6. If the uninstall refuses to start because the game is still running, close the game and launcher first. If it is stuck, end the related process in Task Manager, then try again. This matches the approach outlined in the Dell guide for stubborn apps.

For readers looking up how to uninstall Wuthering Waves PC installs outside a store library, this is the main removal path.

Use the Game Uninstaller if Present

Some third-party PC installs include their own uninstaller. Dell notes that these are often found in the program folder or inside the app's Start menu folder. If you see one, use it only when you are sure it belongs to the exact Wuthering Waves installation you want to remove. That small check helps avoid deleting the wrong game folder or launcher entry.

If you want a quick WuWa uninstall PC rule to remember, it is this: use the Windows app entry first, then use the game's own uninstaller only when the install source is clearly a standalone copy.

Confirm the Folder Is Gone

A successful uninstall window does not always mean every local file disappeared. Open the install location you noted earlier and verify what remains.

  • Check whether the desktop shortcut is gone or now points nowhere.

  • Look in the Start menu for an old launcher shortcut and remove it if it remains.

  • Open the install folder and see whether it was deleted, left empty, or still contains files.

This step removes the local PC copy only. It does not delete your account. Some leftovers can still survive a normal uninstall, which is exactly why a deeper cleanup becomes useful when storage space or recurring launcher problems are still bothering you.

Step 4 Uninstall Wuthering Waves Through Epic Games

Store-managed installs need their own path. If you are looking up how to uninstall Wuthering Waves Epic Games users installed through the Epic Games Launcher, start inside Epic rather than the general Windows app list. A current support walkthrough for Epic Games Store removal shows the same core flow: open the launcher, go to Library, find the game, open its options menu, and choose Uninstall. That keeps the Wuthering Waves Epic Games uninstall tied to the source that installed it.

Open Your Epic Library

Use the launcher first. This avoids the common mistake of treating an Epic install like a standalone PC copy.

  1. Open the Epic Games Launcher on your PC.

  2. Select Library from the left sidebar.

  3. Find Wuthering Waves in your game list.

  4. Open the game's options menu. In the referenced support flow, this appears as three dots next to the Launch button.

  5. Choose the uninstall option from that menu.

Run the Uninstall Command

Click Uninstall, then confirm when prompted. The linked guide notes that launcher versions can look a little different, so menu labels or button placement may vary slightly, but the general path stays the same. If you searched uninstall wuwa because the game still seems tied to Epic, this source-specific route is usually the cleanest place to begin.

Check for Epic Leftovers

After Epic finishes, do a quick verification pass instead of assuming every trace disappeared.

  • Check whether the game still appears as installed in your Epic library.

  • Open Windows Installed apps if you want an extra confirmation check.

  • Look at the original install folder to see whether files remain.

  • Remove any broken desktop shortcut or stale icon if one is still visible.

This removes the local Epic copy only. Your login and account-linked progress are a separate issue. On mobile, the idea is similar, but the taps and menus change quite a bit between Android and iPhone.

Step 5 Remove the Mobile App on Android or iPhone

PC launchers get most of the attention, but plenty of players just want the game off a phone or tablet. If your goal is to delete Wuthering Waves mobile, the safest route is the one your device maker documents. Menus can look a little different across versions, yet the official removal flow stays straightforward.

Delete the App on Android

If you are searching for how to uninstall Wuthering Waves on Android, the most consistent official method comes from Android Help through Google Play:

Platform

Removal path

Android

Open Google Play Store, tap your profile icon, choose Manage apps & devices, tap Manage, select the game, then tap Uninstall.

iPhone

Touch and hold the app, tap Remove App, then tap Delete App and confirm.

That is usually the cleanest answer for readers asking how to uninstall Wuthering Waves on Android without digging through brand-specific menus.

Delete the App on iPhone

For anyone looking up how to uninstall Wuthering Waves on iPhone, Apple Support says to touch and hold the app, tap Remove App, choose Delete App, and confirm. If the Home Screen enters jiggle mode instead, tap the remove icon on the app, then confirm deletion and tap Done. If you cannot find the icon, Apple also suggests using Spotlight search.

Know What Mobile Removal Leaves Behind

Deleting the app removes the local installation from that device, but it does not answer every data question by itself.

  • On Android, Google Play Help notes that some games autosave progress when signed in with Google Play Games, but not all games do.

  • Google also makes clear that in-app data and game accounts are handled by the developer, not Google.

  • On iPhone, deleting an app does not automatically cancel in-app subscriptions, and app data in iCloud backup can require separate cleanup.

So yes, you can remove the app quickly, but if storage still looks too high or a future reinstall keeps old issues alive, the real target is often the leftover data hiding behind the uninstall.

Step 6 Clean Uninstall Wuthering Waves and Clear User Data

If the game is gone but your storage still looks crowded, a standard removal probably left extra files behind. That is the real difference between a basic uninstall and a full clean uninstall. A basic uninstall removes the main program entry. A full cleanup checks for the leftovers that can survive removal, such as cache, settings, screenshots, logs, and launcher data. This is the version to use when you want more space back or when an old install keeps poisoning a fresh one.

Delete Leftover Folders and Cache

On Windows, one of the most important cleanup areas is AppData. That folder is hidden by default, and it includes Local, LocalLow, and Roaming. The reference guide explains that these areas can hold cache, settings, and other user-specific data. You can reveal hidden items in File Explorer, or press Win + R, type AppData, and press Enter to jump into the Roaming branch, then move up to the full AppData folder.

For a clean uninstall Wuthering Waves process, think in categories instead of hunting for one perfect path. Check the install location you noted earlier, then inspect common Windows areas where apps often leave traces. If you want to keep screenshots, exported files, or custom settings, copy them somewhere safe before you delete anything.

Clear User Data Carefully

This is the point where readers searching wuthering waves clear user data or clear user data Wuthering Waves should slow down for a minute. User data is not just junk. The AppData guide notes that Local commonly stores larger cache files and machine-specific data, while Roaming often stores preferences and other personalized settings. Clearing those leftovers can reclaim space and stop a reinstall from inheriting old errors, but it can also remove files you meant to keep.

Clear user data can help free storage and solve reinstall issues, but it is not the same as deleting account progress tied to your login.

Use a Text Cleanup Checklist

  1. Check the original install folder

    • Look in the folder you wrote down earlier, often under Program Files or another custom drive.

    • Delete the game folder only if you are sure the uninstall already finished.

  2. Inspect launcher data and AppData

    • Check AppData Local for cache, launcher remnants, and temporary app data.

    • Check AppData Roaming for saved settings or profile-style files.

    • If visible, check AppData LocalLow too.

  3. Review user folders

    • Look in Documents for saved files, media, or support logs.

    • Keep screenshots or clips you want before removing leftovers.

  4. Clean temporary files and logs

    • Check Temp locations for disposable files.

    • Remove crash logs, empty folders, and stale cached data if you find them.

  5. Remove small remnants

    • Delete broken desktop shortcuts or old Start menu entries.

    • Empty the Recycle Bin after confirming nothing important is inside.

  6. Run a final search

    • Use Windows search with the game or launcher name and review any remaining folders carefully.

This method stays practical because it does not rely on one exact folder name. It helps whether your goal is storage recovery or a cleaner reinstall. Some readers, though, hit a different problem: the folder will not delete, the app still appears installed, or the same bug comes back anyway.

Step 7 Fix Wuthering Waves Uninstall Not Working

Leftover files are one headache. A removal that refuses to finish is another. If Wuthering Waves still appears installed after you already tried the normal steps, match the fix to the symptom instead of deleting random folders. Microsoft Support recommends starting with the basics for Windows desktop apps: restart the PC, open Settings under Apps and Installed apps, and retry the uninstall there. That same support page also notes that Windows 10 can use the Program Install and Uninstall troubleshooter when broken uninstall data blocks removal.

Troubleshoot by Symptom

Issue

Likely cause

Practical fix

Uninstall option is missing

Incomplete uninstall data or a broken app entry.

Check Windows Installed apps first. If the entry is still broken on Windows 10, use the Program Install and Uninstall troubleshooter, then retry removal.

Wuthering Waves still appears installed

An orphaned entry remains after an incomplete uninstall.

Retry removal from the original install source, then confirm in Windows Installed apps. Remove the lingering entry before manual cleanup.

Cannot delete the folder

The game, launcher, or another process is still using the files.

Exit the launcher from the system tray, use Task Manager only if it is stuck, then restart Windows and try again.

Access denied when deleting files

Permissions or ACL rules are blocking deletion.

Use an administrator account and verify you are targeting only the game folder. Adjust ownership or permissions only if needed.

Folder path acts strangely or will not delete

Path length or file naming issues are interfering with Windows file handling.

Shorten the path by moving or renaming parent folders, then retry deletion carefully.

Reinstall still keeps old problems

Cache, settings, or other user data survived the uninstall.

Perform a clean uninstall and clear leftover user data, cache, and settings before reinstalling.

Cannot Delete the Folder

If you cannot uninstall Wuthering Waves because the folder will not go away, the most common causes are a file still being used or permissions blocking deletion. Microsoft Learn lists both as common NTFS file and folder deletion problems. That is why force-deleting the folder too early can create more confusion, especially when wuthering waves uninstall not working is really a process or permission issue.

  1. Close the game, launcher, and any related background process.

  2. Restart Windows, then try again before opening extra apps.

  3. Retry removal from the same source that installed the game.

  4. Use Windows Installed apps to remove orphaned entries if the normal uninstall option is missing.

  5. Delete leftover folders only after the uninstall finishes.

  6. Clear user data and cache if a future reinstall keeps inheriting old errors.

Reinstall Still Keeps Old Problems

When a fresh install brings back the same launcher bug, crash, or bad settings, the old install usually left something behind. That is the real reason some readers say cannot uninstall Wuthering Waves even after the main files are gone. In practice, the uninstall may have removed the program but not the local data feeding the same problem back into the next install. Go back to the clean uninstall checklist, remove confirmed leftovers carefully, and then reinstall only after the device no longer shows stale files or app entries.

A clean device still leaves one separate choice behind: whether you only wanted the local install gone or whether the account should go too.

Step 8 How to Delete WuWa Account or Just Uninstall

A clean device can still leave one bigger decision behind: do you want the game off your device, or do you want the account gone too? If you searched how to delete wuwa account after removing local files, treat that as a separate choice. Uninstalling removes the app or PC installation. Account removal is usually a different process tied to account settings, an agreement screen, or support handling.

Uninstalling Versus Deleting Your Account

These two actions do very different jobs. A Game Rant walkthrough for Wuthering Waves says account deletion removes your progress and advises players to read the Account Deletion Agreement carefully before confirming. That is much closer to a permanent reset than a simple uninstall.

A broader Miniclip support explainer reinforces the same distinction many games follow: deleting the app from your phone does not delete the game account, while permanent account deletion usually means losing access, progression, and purchased or earned items tied to that account. So if your goal is only storage recovery, troubleshooting, or a break, uninstalling is usually enough. If your real goal is wuthering waves account deletion, verify the current in-game or official support path before you proceed.

When to Keep Your Login and Just Take a Break

For most players, keeping the account is the safer move. It lets you free storage now and come back later without turning a temporary break into a permanent loss. That matters if you may reinstall after a patch, move to a new device, or simply change your mind.

  • Keep your account and uninstall if you only want the game off the device.

  • Remove leftover local files too if you want a cleaner reinstall later.

  • Pursue official deletion only if you truly want to delete Wuthering Waves account permanently and accept losing progress tied to that account.

Where to Go if You Return to PC Gaming

If you are rotating games, clearing launcher clutter, or freeing storage before installing something else, keep a quick note of your login method and install source. That makes coming back much easier. For readers tidying up now and rebuilding a library later, VeloxGame PC Game Top Up can be a simple hub to revisit when you return to PC gaming or switch titles.

The local copy is easy to remove. The account decision deserves the extra minute.

Wuthering Waves Uninstall FAQ

1. How do I uninstall Wuthering Waves on Windows PC?

First confirm whether your copy was installed with a standalone launcher or through a store. For a standalone Windows install, close the game and launcher completely, then remove it from Settings under Apps. If that entry fails, try Control Panel or the built-in uninstaller only if you are certain it belongs to the same install. Afterward, check the install folder, desktop shortcut, and Start menu entry so you do not leave behind unnecessary local files.

2. How do I uninstall Wuthering Waves from Epic Games Launcher?

Use Epic Games Launcher first instead of the general Windows app list. Open Library, find Wuthering Waves, open the game's options menu, and run the uninstall command there. When Epic finishes, do a quick verification pass in Windows and in the original install location. This store-first approach usually avoids the confusion that happens when a store-managed game is removed from the wrong place.

3. How do I delete Wuthering Waves on Android or iPhone?

On Android, you can usually remove the game from Google Play or by long-pressing the app icon and choosing uninstall. On iPhone, press and hold the icon, tap Remove App, then confirm Delete App. This takes the game off that device, but extra items such as cloud backup data, cached files, or store-related app data may need separate review if your goal is a more complete cleanup.

4. Does uninstalling Wuthering Waves delete my account, characters, or purchases?

Usually no. Uninstalling mainly affects the files stored on your device, while account-linked progress, characters, and purchase records are typically tied to your sign-in rather than the installed app itself. Permanent account removal is a separate decision and often requires account settings or support steps. If you may return later, verify which login method you used before uninstalling so you can recover access more easily.

5. How do I do a clean uninstall if Wuthering Waves still leaves files behind or keeps old problems after reinstall?

Start by fully closing the game, launcher, and any background process that may still be using its files. Remove the main app first, then review leftover folders, cache, temporary files, settings, screenshots, logs, shortcuts, and the Recycle Bin. If deletion is blocked, restart Windows and try again before forcing folder removal. This deeper cleanup is useful when reclaiming storage or fixing persistent reinstall issues. If you are rotating PC games afterward, keeping notes about your install source and login can save time, and VELOX's PC game hub can be a practical bookmark when you rebuild your library later.
seoTitle: How To Uninstall Wuthering Waves Without Missing Hidden Files

title: How Many Gigabytes Is Genshin Impact Mobile? What Stores Won't Show
content:
How Many Gigabytes Is Genshin Impact Mobile?

If you want the quick answer to how many gigabytes is genshin impact mobile, the app-store number is only the starting point. On iPhone, the official App Store lists the app at 4 GB, but Apple also says the game needs 40 GB of available storage or more, with 60 GB recommended. The current Google Play page provided here does not publish one fixed Android size, which is a strong hint that the final footprint depends on device-specific delivery, first-launch resource downloads, extra language or voice data, and later updates. In other words, Genshin Impact size on mobile ends up much larger than the store listing suggests.

How Many Gigabytes Is Genshin Impact Mobile at a Glance

Platform

Store listing size

Initial install

In-game asset download

Typical installed footprint

Recommended extra free space

Android

No single fixed size shown in the current Google Play reference

Varies by device and app delivery

Required before the game is fully playable

Much larger than the base store download after resources and updates

Leave substantial headroom; the provided Play listing does not give one fixed storage figure

iPhone

4 GB on the App Store

Starts from the listed app package, then expands with setup data

Required after launch

Far above 4 GB once game resources are added

Apple lists 40 GB available minimum and 60 GB recommended

Myth: the number shown in the store is the full game size. Reality: it is only the starting download, not the final playable install.

Store Listing Size Versus Real Installed Size

This is why searches like how much storage does genshin impact take up on mobile often produce conflicting answers. One number refers to the app listing. Another reflects the installed files after setup. A third includes updates and extra resources. All of those can be different while still describing the same game. That is the core reason genshin mobile size feels bigger than expected.

What Mobile Players Should Check Before Downloading

  • Your free space before installing, not just the store page number.

  • Your platform, because iPhone has official storage guidance while Android can vary by device.

  • Room for future patches and post-install resources, not only the first download.

That gap between download size, installed size, and available storage is where most confusion starts, and it is also where a clearer step-by-step breakdown becomes far more useful than any single gigabyte figure.

What Counts Toward Genshin Impact File Size

A single number rarely answers the storage question well. The genshin impact download size shown in a store listing, the space used after installation, and the room needed for a patch are connected, but they are not the same thing. If you are trying to figure out how much storage does genshin impact take, the clearest approach is to read the install in stages instead of chasing one headline figure.

What Counts Toward Genshin Impact File Size

  1. Store listing size. Start with the official App Store or Google Play page for your device. That number is the base app package shown before installation. It is useful, but it does not represent the full playable game.

  2. Initial app install. After the phone downloads the package, the operating system still has to unpack it, place files in app storage, and create working data. That means the installed app can already take more room than the listing suggests.

  3. In-game resource download. Genshin also uses separate resource packages. A current Version 6.5 pre-install guide lists mobile pre-install packages at 3.89 GB on Android and 3.87 GB on iOS, and notes those figures assume only the English language pack is installed. That is update data, not the whole game, but it clearly shows how much content can sit outside the small store number.

  4. Post-update footprint. The full genshin impact file size grows as patches add regions, quests, media files, and optional language content. Some files are replaced, some are added, and some temporary data may linger until cleanup finishes.

  5. Temporary free space. This is the stage most players underestimate. Live-service games often download, unzip, verify, rewrite, and replace files during installation or patching.

From Download to Playable Install

That is why the store page is only the first checkpoint. The official listing is still the right place to check the base size shown for your device, but it should never be treated as the total storage budget. In practical terms, the genshin download size you see first is only the front door. The real jump happens when the client prepares resource data and turns that small package into a playable install.

Why Temporary Space Matters More Than You Think

Android patching behavior helps explain the problem. The Unity patching manual describes how changed files can be staged in cache and app data directories while the app redirects file reads to those updated resources. Even without digging into engine details, the takeaway is simple: a phone can have enough room for the finished game and still fail the install because it does not have enough spare space for the work in progress.

The most useful storage number for mobile planning is free space available before install, not just the final size after completion.

That also explains why two players on the same version can end up looking at different totals once platform behavior, packaging, and leftover cached data enter the picture.

Why Android and iPhone Totals Do Not Match

That platform behavior is a big reason there is no single universal answer to how big is genshin impact mobile. Two players can install the same version and still see different storage totals, because Android, iPhone, and iPad do not receive, unpack, and report app data in exactly the same way.

Why Genshin Mobile Size Differs on Android and iPhone

Emerge's breakdown shows the first mismatch clearly. The App Store presents an install-size style number, while Google Play typically shows a compressed download-size number. Those are different measurements before Genshin's own in-game resources are fully counted. Emerge also explains that Android can grow after installation because ART may pre-compile part of an app and store that native code on the device. So a small-looking Play figure does not mean a small on-phone footprint.

Why totals differ

Android

iPhone

iPad

Store number shown

Usually a compressed download-size figure

An install-size style figure

The same App Store approach, but for an iPad-specific variant

Package delivery

App bundles and split APKs can target the device more narrowly

App thinning creates a device-specific iPhone variant

App thinning can send a different iPad-targeted variant

After install

Can expand as Android prepares app code for the device

Native code is already shipped in the app package

Same iOS behavior, but not always the exact same delivered assets as iPhone

Languages and resources

Device targeting can reduce unneeded resources

iOS downloads keep supported localizations

Same localization behavior, plus iPad-specific asset choices can shift totals

A screenshot from another player is a clue, not a guarantee.

How iPad Storage Can Vary From iPhone

That matters for people asking how much storage does genshin impact take up on ipad. iPad is still mobile, but it should not be treated as a carbon copy of iPhone storage. Emerge notes that Apple uses app thinning to deliver device-specific variants, which means an iPad and an iPhone may not pull the exact same package mix.

What Device and OS Differences Actually Change

This is why searches such as how many gbs is genshin impact mobile or how large is genshin on mobile often turn up conflicting screenshots. Platform packaging explains part of the gap. Device-specific delivery explains another part. Your own local install state can widen it further. In short, other users' screenshots are useful as rough references, but your phone is the only one that can reveal your real total once the game finishes downloading and settling in. And because Genshin keeps adding content, the platform gap is only one piece of the bigger storage story.

Why Genshin Keeps Growing on Mobile

For anyone asking why is genshin impact so big, the main reason is its format. Genshin is maintained like a live service game, which means the client keeps expanding instead of staying frozen at launch size. Games in this model grow through repeated content drops, new areas, missions, events, and ongoing revisions. That is why questions like how many gigabytes is genshin impact or how big is genshin impact never have one permanent answer on mobile.

Why Genshin Impact Is So Big on Mobile

Your phone is not just storing the base app. It also has to hold the current version's required resources, and those resources can change whenever a patch lands. HoYoverse's pre-installation notice warns mobile players about large file sizes and even mentions file restructuring. That detail matters. Some updates do not simply add files. They also reorganize and replace them, which can make the overall footprint feel heavier over time.

  • Core game files: the app itself and the required resources for the current version.

  • Optional resources: extra voice-over languages you choose to keep installed.

  • Temporary patch data: pre-install files and other update resources that may sit on the device while new content is being prepared.

How Voice Over Packs Change the Total Size

This is one of the easiest storage factors to miss. The HoYoverse Help Center confirms that players can install or remove voice packs such as English, Japanese, Chinese, and Korean. It also notes that selected packs may download automatically for new content. In plain terms, two players on the same version can end up with different totals simply because one keeps a single language and the other keeps several. If you have ever wondered how much gb is genshin impact on one phone versus another, voice packs are a major reason.

Why the Download Keeps Growing Over Time

Any fixed storage number can age quickly after a major patch. New content arrives, optional audio builds up, and update files can temporarily raise the total again. So the smartest way to read Genshin mobile size is as a moving estimate, not a forever-static value. On a phone with limited storage, that shifting total matters just as much as the final install, because future updates need room to arrive before the game can settle back down.

How Much Free Space to Leave for Genshin

If you are really asking how much space does genshin impact take up, the most useful number is not the finished install. It is the free space your phone has before a first download or a major patch. Genshin is installed in layers: the base app, the in-game resources, and then update data that still needs room to download, unpack, verify, and replace older files. That is why a device can look ready on paper, then stop halfway through the process.

How Much Free Space to Leave Before Installing

Treat the final installed size as a floor, not a target. If your phone only has barely enough room for the expected end result, the install is already tight. A safer plan is to leave a generous buffer above the game's current footprint so the system can finish its temporary work without choking on low storage. In practical terms, how much storage does genshin take up during installation matters more than the number you see after everything settles.

This applies to both first-time installs and routine updates. Even when a patch sounds small, the phone may still need spare room to process it cleanly. If storage is close to full, clear more than the bare minimum.

Why a Genshin Update Can Fail With Enough Room

The usual trap is confusing final size with working space. Other apps may be sitting on large caches. An older partial download may still exist. Resource verification may stall and create duplicated temporary files. On nearly full phones, even scattered or fragmented free space can make a big update less cooperative than the raw storage number suggests. That is why people asking how much space does genshin take up often feel like the math does not add up.

What to Expect From Pre Install Packages

Pre-install packages make the temporary-space problem easier to see. The 5.7 preload guide notes that mobile preloading downloads essential files ahead of release, but those files are not installed until the patch is live and you launch the game. In plain terms, pre-install can push storage use up for a while because incoming files may sit on the device before older ones are fully replaced.

  1. Check that free space is comfortably above the game's current footprint, not barely equal to it.

  2. Restart the phone before retrying so stuck background tasks and temporary locks are cleared.

  3. Delete or offload cached videos, social apps, and old downloads that quietly consume working room.

  4. Pause other large downloads so Genshin is not competing for the same temporary storage.

  5. If pre-install is available and your phone is tight on space, skip it and wait for the live patch instead.

  6. If the client gets stuck on verification, let it finish on stable power and connection before retrying repeated downloads.

  7. As a last resort, back up your login method and reinstall to remove bloated temporary data.

That is why how much storage does genshin take is only half the planning question. The other half is how much room your phone needs to survive patch week without drama, and that often comes down to optional content and leftover data rather than the core client alone.

Practical Ways to Reduce Genshin Mobile Size

The easiest storage wins usually do not come from the core install. They come from the extra layers around it. So if you are trying to figure out how much space does genshin take up on mobile, focus on optional resources and supported cleanup tools first, not on risky manual file deletion.

How to Reduce Genshin Mobile Size Safely

The safest place to start is inside the game itself. The HoYoverse Help Center confirms that players can install or remove English, Japanese, Chinese, and Korean voice packs through Phone > Settings > Language > Settings > Voice > Voice Pack Resource Management. It also notes that selected voice packs may download automatically when new content arrives. If you only use one language, removing the others is one of the cleanest ways to lower your genshin impact storage size.

  • Keep only the voice-over language or languages you actually use.

  • Check in-game resource menus before big patches to see whether optional cleanup tools are available in your current build.

  • Use Wi-Fi for large voice-pack downloads, which HoYoverse recommends for these bigger files.

  • Leave extra phone storage open before updates so temporary patch data has room to process.

Which Files You May Be Able to Remove

There is another possible cleanup area, but it needs a careful check. A HoYoLAB guide shows a mobile path of Settings > Resources > Quest Resource Management > Past Quest Resources, with the option to uninstall completed quest assets and download them again later if needed. Because that walkthrough is a player-made guide and menu layouts can change, verify that the option appears in your own client before depending on it. That is one reason questions like how much gb does genshin impact take on mobile or how many gb is genshin impact mobile rarely have one perfect answer for every player.

When Reinstalling Can Help With Storage Bloat

If supported in-game cleanup is not enough, reinstalling is the most reasonable last resort. Treat it as a reset, not a shortcut.

  • Confirm your login method and account access before deleting the app or its data.

  • Use reinstalling when you want a clean rebuild after multiple updates or resource changes.

  • Expect the game to grow again after required assets and any selected voice packs return.

  • Do not delete random Genshin files outside the app unless you know exactly what your phone is removing.

  • Do not assume a reinstall will shrink the game back to the store listing size.

  • Do not remove app data first and check account details later.

The practical goal is modest but useful: remove optional content, clear supported leftovers, and create room for future patches. On a storage-limited phone, that same idea also makes game-to-game comparisons far more realistic than staring at the store number alone.

How Genshin Compares With Other HoYo Mobile Games

On a storage-limited phone, comparing one HoYo title against another is less about bragging rights and more about survival. Genshin can feel huge, but clean side-by-side answers are rare because official materials do not usually give one universal final install number for every device. That is why many discussions around hoyo game sizes end up mixing store downloads, optional resources, and post-update totals as if they were the same thing.

How Genshin Compares With Other HoYo Game Sizes

Why Mobile Install Behavior Matters Across HoYoverse Games

The most useful lesson here is not that Genshin is always the biggest. It is that mobile install behavior matters more than headline numbers. Genshin's official support page shows one clear variable: optional voice content can change the total, and future content can trigger more downloads. Even if another title handles resources differently, searches for hoyoverse games gigabytes still need that same caution. A small-looking app-store number does not automatically describe the full playable game.

Which Storage Number Is Most Useful When Comparing Games

If you are deciding which HoYo game stays on your phone, compare available free space before install or patching, not just the first number shown in a store. That lens is far more practical than chasing a single cross-game gigabyte answer, especially when updates, optional files, and device-specific delivery keep shifting the total. For many players, the smarter choice is not the smallest download, but the game their phone can keep updated without constant cleanup.

How to Decide If Genshin Is Worth Keeping on Mobile

For most players, the storage question only matters because it leads to a bigger decision: should this game live on your phone full time, or would another device be less frustrating? Genshin makes the most sense on mobile when you have enough free space for the current install, enough headroom for future patches, and a phone that can handle longer sessions without constant cleanup. If you are still asking how many gb is genshin, the practical answer is not just a number. It is whether your device can absorb that number repeatedly as updates arrive.

Is Genshin Worth Keeping on Your Phone

Keep it installed on mobile if you play daily, value quick resin spending or commissions, and have room left after the game is installed. A tablet or newer phone is often the better fit for players who want Genshin as an everyday game. On the other hand, if your storage is already tight, your phone struggles with large patches, or you only log in occasionally, mobile can feel like maintenance work. In that case, another platform may be the better long-term home, even if you now know how many gb is genshin impact in broad terms.

How to Decide After You Clear the Space

  • Free space: Do not stop at the minimum. Generic storage guidance from Samsung recommends leaving extra room for updates and then keeping a buffer.

  • Device performance: GameWith lists 40 GB of available storage or more for Android and iOS in its current requirements summary, which is a good reminder that install success and smooth play are not the same thing.

  • Update tolerance: If frequent patch downloads annoy you, this may not be your best phone game.

  • Long-term play: If you expect to stay active for months, plan for growth, not just today's footprint.

Helpful Resources for Active Genshin Players

If your phone clears the storage hurdle and you know you will keep playing, the next useful step is convenience. Official support pages for voice packs and resource management help keep the install under control. Players who also want smoother progression can look at VeloxGame Genshin top up, whose page says it supports UID-only orders for Genesis Crystals and Welkin Moon with fast delivery. That is not essential for everyone, but for active players who have already decided the game is worth the space, it is a practical extra resource rather than a storage fix. And that is the real takeaway behind questions like how big is genshin or how many gigs is genshin impact: the smartest choice is the one your phone can keep updated without becoming a burden.

Genshin Impact Mobile Size FAQ

1. How many GB is Genshin Impact mobile after installation?

There is no one-size-fits-all total for every phone. The store listing only covers the base app package, while the playable game grows after in-game resources, voice packs, and later updates are added. For that reason, the best way to estimate the real footprint is to check the current official store page for your device and plan around available free space, not just the initial download figure.

2. Why does Genshin Impact use different storage on Android, iPhone, and iPad?

The same game version can still take different amounts of space because each platform handles app delivery and storage differently. Android may install device-specific packages and create extra compiled data, while Apple can send different variants to iPhone and iPad. Optional language packs, cached files, and leftover patch data add even more variation, so another player's screenshot should be treated as a rough reference rather than a guaranteed match.

3. How much free space should I leave before installing or updating Genshin on mobile?

Leave a comfortable buffer above the expected final size instead of trying to fit the game exactly. During installation or patching, the client may need temporary room to download, unpack, verify, and replace files, so a phone that looks fine on paper can still fail mid-process. If storage is tight, clear cached media, old downloads, and other large app data before starting, and be cautious with pre-install packages because they can raise storage use for a while.

4. Can I reduce Genshin Impact storage on mobile safely?

Yes, but the safest savings usually come from optional content rather than the core game. Start by removing voice-over packs you do not use and check whether your current client offers resource management tools for older content. If the app feels bloated after many updates, reinstalling can help, but only after you confirm your login method and account access so your progress stays protected.

5. What should active players do after clearing enough space for Genshin?

Once your phone can handle Genshin comfortably, the next step is keeping the experience smooth over time. That means leaving room for future patches, avoiding unnecessary voice packs, and using reliable account and support resources when needed. If you know you will be playing regularly and want faster progression, easier pulls, or a simple way to buy Genesis Crystals or Welkin Moon, Velox's Genshin top up page can be a practical option because it supports UID-only orders with fast delivery.

title: Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya Preview Leak: Tsaritsa, 12 New Characters, Sandrone’s Full Team
content:
Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya Preview: What the New Leak Claims

Genshin Impact’s road to Snezhnaya is starting to look much more serious. According to the latest Version 7.0 leak discussion, HoYoverse may soon reveal the first major Snezhnaya preview trailer, showing up to 12 new “satellite” characters, the long-awaited Tsaritsa story appearance, and the early framework for Snezhnaya’s new combat systems.

The biggest talking points are hard to ignore: Sandrone is expected to headline Version 6.7 before Snezhnaya begins, the Cryo Archon may finally step into the main story in Version 7.0, and a new 4-star “mini Cryo Archon” style support may be given for free through a later Version 7.1 event or quest. On top of that, Snezhnaya’s early patches may introduce new Cryo-related mechanics such as new Cryo reactions, Star Superconduct, and Star Swirl.

Planning to pull Sandrone, the Tsaritsa, or one of the new Snezhnaya supports? Make sure your Primogem budget is ready before the next banner cycle gets messy. For players who want a quick and budget-friendly recharge option, Topuplist’s Genshin Impact Top Up page offers Genesis Crystals and Blessing of the Welkin Moon options, including small crystal packs for Travelers preparing their next pity or guarantee.

As always with pre-release Genshin Impact leaks, none of this should be treated as final until HoYoverse confirms it through official livestreams, trailers, or patch notes. Still, if the current information is accurate, Version 7.0 could be one of the most important transition patches since Fontaine and Natlan.

When Could the Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya Trailer Release?

The leak claims that the first Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya preview trailer may arrive sometime between June 19 and July 1.

That timing would make sense if HoYoverse follows its previous regional marketing pattern. Earlier major region previews were usually released shortly before the final patch of the current region went live. Nod-Krai’s teaser reportedly arrived around eight days before Natlan Version 5.8 opened, Natlan’s preview came shortly before Fontaine Version 4.8, and Fontaine’s teaser arrived before Sumeru Version 3.8.

If Version 6.7 launches on July 1 as currently rumored, a Snezhnaya teaser in late June would fit the usual rhythm. That means players may not have to wait much longer for their first official look at the Cryo nation’s full atmosphere, main cast, and possible early story direction.

Genshin Impact 6.7 Banner Schedule: Sandrone, Raiden Shogun, Archons, and Citlali

Before Snezhnaya fully begins, Version 6.7 is rumored to be a major banner patch.

The current leak claims that Sandrone, also known as the Marionette, will be the main promoted character of Version 6.7. She is reportedly expected to appear in the first half alongside Raiden Shogun, with Version 6.7 opening on July 1. The 6.7 livestream is also rumored for June 19 at 8 PM, where players would normally expect the usual 300 Primogem redemption codes.

The second half of the patch is said to feature multiple high-profile reruns, including Archon-level banner pressure and Citlali with a possible outfit-related push. If accurate, this would make Version 6.7 a difficult patch for players saving for Snezhnaya, especially if Sandrone turns out to be an important bridge character for the new Version 7.0 combat system.

For now, the safest reading is this: Version 6.7 may not be a simple filler patch. It may be the setup patch that prepares Sandrone and several older characters for the Snezhnaya meta.

Sponsored note: If Version 6.7 really stacks Sandrone, Raiden Shogun, Archon reruns, and Citlali pressure into one patch, wish planning gets brutal fast. Players who are short on pulls can check Topuplist Genshin Impact Top Up for Genesis Crystals or Welkin Moon options before deciding whether to push pity now or keep saving for Version 7.0.

12 New Snezhnaya Characters May Appear in the 7.0 Preview

One of the biggest claims is that the Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya preview trailer may reveal 12 new characters.

That does not mean all 12 characters will become playable immediately. Genshin Impact has a long history of showing major story characters far earlier than their banner release. Some characters may appear mainly to push the Archon Quest, set up future Fatui storylines, or plant long-term lore threads. Dainsleif is the easiest comparison: he has appeared across many versions, but that has never meant an immediate playable release.

The leak suggests that some of these Snezhnaya characters may function more like long-term story pieces than instant banner units. That makes the 7.0 preview trailer potentially important not just for pull planning, but also for understanding the final stage of Teyvat’s main story.

Two New 5-Star Supports in Version 7.0

The current rumor points to two new 5-star supports in Version 7.0.

One is described as a new tall male Anemo support, while the other appears to be tied to the early Snezhnaya system. If this is accurate, HoYoverse may be using Version 7.0 to establish support characters first, rather than immediately releasing the Cryo Archon as the main banner centerpiece.

That would not be unusual. New region metas often begin by introducing enablers, supports, and reaction tools before the full premium team structure becomes obvious.

Vodyanitsa, the Rumored Electro Support

Another rumored character name currently circulating is Vodyanitsa, described in the source as an Electro support.

The name is not officially confirmed, and English spelling may change if the character is real. However, if Vodyanitsa is indeed an Electro support, she could be tied to the rumored Star Superconduct system or other Snezhnaya reaction upgrades.

Electro supports tend to age well in Genshin Impact because they can interact with many reaction types, including Electro-Charged, Overload, Aggravate, Superconduct, and newer regional mechanics. If Version 7.0 introduces a Snezhnaya-specific Superconduct variant, an Electro support could become a major early pull target.

A New 4-Star Cryo Support May Be Free

The leak also mentions a new 4-star Cryo support, described by some players as a “mini Cryo Archon” because of her possible role in early Snezhnaya teams.

According to the rumor, this character may appear as a banner 4-star in Version 7.0 and then become obtainable for free through a Version 7.1 event or major quest. If true, this would be a very player-friendly move, especially if Snezhnaya’s early reaction system depends heavily on Cryo support.

This kind of free unit would also help players test the new region’s combat mechanics without forcing everyone to pull for multiple 5-stars immediately.

Tsaritsa May Finally Appear in the 7.0 Main Story

The most exciting part of the leak is the claim that the Tsaritsa will finally appear in the Version 7.0 main story.

The Tsaritsa has been one of Genshin Impact’s biggest long-term mysteries since the beginning of the Teyvat storyline. As the Cryo Archon of Snezhnaya and the power behind the Fatui, she is central to the game’s entire Gnosis plotline. For years, players have heard about her ideals, her rebellion, and her influence, but her full appearance has remained hidden.

The new leak suggests that the Tsaritsa will appear in the 7.0 Archon Quest, but her playable banner may not arrive until around Version 7.3. That would match HoYoverse’s usual pattern of introducing an Archon in the story before making them available as a playable character later in the region cycle.

If true, Version 7.0 may finally give players their first serious look at the Cryo Archon’s design, personality, and role in the final conflict of Teyvat.

Sandrone Could Unlock Her Full Team Potential in Snezhnaya

Sandrone may be one of the biggest winners of the Snezhnaya transition.

The leak suggests that Sandrone’s early kit may not reach its full potential until more Snezhnaya characters arrive. This would make her similar to other characters who gained value once their intended team system became more complete.

If Version 7.0 introduces new Cryo, Electro, Anemo, or Star-based reactions, Sandrone may become the core of a new team archetype rather than a standalone DPS or support. The rumored free 4-star Cryo support could also help activate her early teams, allowing players to build a functional Sandrone composition before the Tsaritsa arrives.

For players planning their Primogems, this is important. Sandrone may not just be a Version 6.7 character. She may be a long-term investment for the first half of Snezhnaya.

If you are close to pity but still short of a guarantee, this is the point where budgeting matters. Topuplist can be a useful recharge option for players who want extra Genesis Crystals before a key banner, while Welkin Moon remains one of the better long-term value choices for regular daily players.

New Snezhnaya Combat Systems: Cryo, Star Superconduct, and Star Swirl

The leak points to several new mechanics arriving between Version 7.0 and Version 7.2, including new Cryo-related gameplay, Star Superconduct, and Star Swirl.

While the exact mechanics are still unclear, the names suggest that Snezhnaya may refresh older reaction types rather than simply adding raw damage multipliers. Superconduct has long been one of Genshin Impact’s more niche reactions, mainly used for Physical damage support. If Snezhnaya introduces a new version of Superconduct, it could completely change how Cryo and Electro teams are built.

Star Swirl could also give Anemo supports a new role in Snezhnaya teams. That would explain why a new 5-star Anemo support is rumored for Version 7.0.

The overall direction seems clear: Snezhnaya may not simply be “Cryo region equals Cryo DPS.” Instead, it may use Cryo as the center of a wider reaction system involving Electro, Anemo, and new regional mechanics.

Should Players Save Primogems for Genshin Impact 7.0?

If the current leaks are even partly accurate, players should be careful with their Version 6.7 pulls.

Sandrone may be worth watching closely because she could become a major Snezhnaya system character. However, Version 7.0 may introduce multiple new supports, a free Cryo unit, and early team pieces that reshape the meta. The Tsaritsa herself may not arrive until Version 7.3, which means players may need to plan across several patches instead of dumping everything into one banner.

For F2P and Welkin players, the safest strategy is to avoid pulling only for hype. Focus on characters who either complete your current teams or clearly connect to the upcoming Snezhnaya system.

If you want Sandrone, make sure you are comfortable with the possibility that her best team may not be fully available on day one. If you want the Tsaritsa, saving through 7.0 and 7.1 may be the smarter move.

For players who do decide to spend, keep it controlled and banner-focused. Topuplist’s Genshin Impact recharge page lists Genesis Crystals and Blessing of the Welkin Moon options, which can help players prepare for pity, weapon banners, or a last-minute guarantee without overcomplicating the pull plan.

Final Thoughts

Genshin Impact 7.0 is shaping up to be much more than a normal regional update.

The rumored Snezhnaya preview trailer could introduce 12 new characters, reveal the Cryo Archon in the main story, set up Sandrone’s full team potential, and launch a new wave of Cryo-centered reaction systems. The possibility of a free 4-star Cryo support also makes the early Snezhnaya meta more interesting for players who do not want to spend heavily right away.

For now, treat these details as leaks, not confirmed patch notes. But if the current information holds, Version 6.7 and Version 7.0 may become two of the most important patches for long-term account planning in Genshin Impact.

Snezhnaya is no longer a distant mystery. It is starting to look like the next major turning point for the entire game.

7. FAQs

When will the Genshin Impact 7.0 Snezhnaya preview trailer release?

The current leak suggests that the first Snezhnaya preview trailer may release between June 19 and July 1, likely before or around the launch window of Version 6.7. This timing is not officially confirmed yet.

Is the Tsaritsa playable in Genshin Impact 7.0?

According to the leak, the Tsaritsa may appear in the Version 7.0 main story, but her playable banner may arrive later, possibly around Version 7.3. Players should wait for official confirmation before planning pulls around this timeline.

How many new characters will appear in the Snezhnaya preview?

The rumor claims that up to 12 new Snezhnaya characters may appear in the Version 7.0 preview trailer. However, not all of them are expected to become playable immediately.

Is Sandrone coming in Version 6.7?

Current leak discussion points to Sandrone, also known as the Marionette, as the main promoted character of Version 6.7. She is rumored to appear in the first half of the patch, but the final banner schedule still needs official confirmation.

Will Genshin Impact give a free Cryo character in Snezhnaya?

The leak claims that a new 4-star Cryo support may appear in Version 7.0 and become obtainable for free through a Version 7.1 event or quest. This is still unconfirmed, but it would make sense if HoYoverse wants players to test the new Snezhnaya combat system.

What are Star Superconduct and Star Swirl in Genshin Impact?

Star Superconduct and Star Swirl are rumored Snezhnaya reaction mechanics mentioned in leak discussions. Their exact effects are not known yet, but they may refresh older Cryo, Electro, and Anemo team-building options in Version 7.0 and beyond.

Where can I top up for Genshin Impact before the Snezhnaya banners?

Players who need extra pulls before Sandrone, the Tsaritsa, or other Snezhnaya banners can use Topuplist’s Genshin Impact Top Up page for Genesis Crystals or Blessing of the Welkin Moon. As with any purchase, always check the latest product details and complete your recharge through the correct game page.

Best Drive Discs for Starlight Billy

Best 4-Piece Drive Disc Set

The best Drive Disc setup for Starlight Billy is:

4-piece Yunkui Tales + 2-piece Fanged Metal / Woodpecker Electro / Branch & Blade Song

For the 4-piece set, Yunkui Tales is the best choice. It gives Starlight Billy the exact stat profile he wants: HP, Crit Rate, and Sheer Damage support. Since Starlight Billy is a Rupture DPS rather than a standard Attack DPS, Yunkui Tales fits both his scaling and his combat rhythm extremely well.

This is not just a decent option. For serious Starlight Billy builds, Yunkui Tales should be treated as his core Drive Disc set.

Best 2-Piece Drive Disc Options

For the 2-piece set, the best choice depends on your current stats and team.

Fanged Metal is generally the best damage-focused 2-piece option. Starlight Billy already gains a large amount of Crit DMG from his own kit and common support setups, so extra Physical damage often gives better value than stacking even more crit damage.

Woodpecker Electro is a strong option if your Crit Rate is not high enough yet. Since Starlight Billy wants very consistent crits, this can be the easiest way to fix an incomplete build.

Branch & Blade Song is a good alternative if you want more Crit DMG or need a flexible crit-based 2-piece set.

For most builds, the priority is:

Fanged Metal for the highest damage ceiling
Woodpecker Electro if you need more Crit Rate
Branch & Blade Song if your build needs more Crit DMG

Best Main Stats for Starlight Billy

The best Starlight Billy main stats are:

Slot 4: Crit Rate
Slot 5: Physical DMG Bonus
Slot 6: HP%

Slot 4 should almost always be Crit Rate. Starlight Billy has access to a lot of Crit DMG through his own kit and team buffs, so building enough Crit Rate is more important than chasing an oversized Crit DMG number. For most players, Crit Rate is the most stable and practical choice.

Crit DMG on slot 4 can still work if your substats are unusually strong, but it is usually less consistent.

Slot 5 should be Physical DMG Bonus. HP% may look tempting because Starlight Billy has HP-related Rupture scaling, but Physical DMG Bonus usually gives better returns unless your HP% piece has much better substats.

Slot 6 should be HP%. This supports his Rupture scaling and helps convert his build into stronger Sheer Damage output.

Best Substats for Starlight Billy

The best Starlight Billy substat priority is:

Crit Rate = Crit DMG > HP% > ATK%

Crit Rate and Crit DMG are his most important substats. However, Crit Rate has slightly higher practical value because Starlight Billy already receives a large amount of Crit DMG from his own buffs and teammates. Your goal should be to push him as close to 100% Crit Rate as reasonably possible while keeping a balanced crit ratio.

After double crit, HP% is the next priority because it supports his Rupture and Sheer Force scaling. ATK% is still useful, but it generally falls behind HP% for this specific Agent.

When farming Drive Discs, look for pieces with Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and HP% together. Those are the pieces most likely to become long-term keepers for Starlight Billy.

Starlight Billy Skill Priority

The best Starlight Billy skill priority is:

Special Attack > Chain Attack > Basic Attack > Assist = Dodge

Starlight Billy uses most parts of his kit, but some skills matter more than others.

His Special Attack should be your first priority. It is one of the most important parts of his damage rotation and should be leveled first if you want to maximize his output.

His Chain Attack comes next. Starlight Billy benefits heavily from burst windows, so Chain Attack investment gives strong returns in real combat.

His Basic Attack is also worth leveling because he still uses it frequently during normal rotations.

For most players, Special Attack, Chain Attack, and Basic Attack should be raised to at least level 11. If you plan to fully invest in him, the best order is:

Special Attack first
Chain Attack second
Basic Attack third

Assist and Dodge are useful, but they do not need to be maxed immediately. Keeping them around level 11 is enough for a complete Starlight Billy build.

Best Starlight Billy Teams

Best Premium Starlight Billy Team

The best Starlight Billy team is:

Starlight Billy + Dialyn + Lucia

This is the cleanest premium setup for Starlight Billy. Dialyn gives him the Stun support he needs to create strong damage windows, while Lucia provides valuable support for his damage profile. Together, they help Starlight Billy unload his Physical Rupture damage more efficiently.

This team works because Starlight Billy wants two things: a reliable opening to deal damage and teammates who can amplify his already high-scaling Rupture output. Dialyn and Lucia both help him reach that goal.

If you want the strongest Starlight Billy team for endgame content, this is the first comp to consider.

Best Alternative Starlight Billy Team

A strong alternative team is:

Starlight Billy + Ju Fufu + Pan Yinhu

Ju Fufu is the main replacement if you do not have Dialyn. While Dialyn is the stronger premium option, Ju Fufu can still fill the Stun role well enough to keep Starlight Billy’s rotations functional.

Pan Yinhu is the practical replacement if you do not have Lucia or if Lucia is needed for another team. This matters for players trying to build two Rupture-based teams or split support units across different endgame stages.

The general team-building rule is simple:

Use Dialyn if you have her. Use Ju Fufu if you do not. Use Lucia as the first-choice support, and Pan Yinhu as the flexible replacement.

If you are still missing one key teammate or trying to save enough pulls for Billy’s W-Engine, plan around what your account actually needs. A clean team upgrade is usually more valuable than spreading pulls across every banner. For players who still need extra Monochrome before the banner ends, Topuplist is one recharge option to check before making the final pull decision.

Is Starlight Billy Worth Building?

Yes, Starlight Billy is worth building if you need a high-ceiling Physical Rupture main DPS.

His damage numbers are strong, his best Drive Disc set is clear, and his ideal team structure is easy to understand. He does require proper investment, especially in Crit Rate and Drive Disc quality, but the payoff is high once his stats are balanced.

The biggest mistake is building him like a normal Attack DPS. Starlight Billy wants Rupture-focused stats, HP% support, Crit Rate consistency, and teammates who can help him maximize Sheer Damage.

If you already pulled him, prioritize Yunkui Tales farming, secure a strong Crit Rate slot 4, and build around Dialyn/Lucia or Ju Fufu/Pan Yinhu. Once his stats and team are in place, Starlight Billy becomes one of the strongest and flashiest Physical DPS options in Zenless Zone Zero 2.8.

For players who plan to keep investing in ZZZ beyond one banner, Inter-Knot Membership can also be a steady long-term resource option. You can view Monochrome and membership options on Topuplist’s Zenless Zone Zero page, but always keep spending tied to a clear banner goal rather than impulse pulls.

7. FAQs

What is the best W-Engine for Starlight Billy?

The best W-Engine for Starlight Billy is Starlight Rider Faceplate, his signature S-Rank W-Engine. It is designed for Rupture Agents and gives him the strongest overall damage ceiling.

What is the best Drive Disc set for Starlight Billy?

The best Drive Disc set for Starlight Billy is 4-piece Yunkui Tales with a 2-piece damage or crit set. Fanged Metal is usually the best 2-piece option, while Woodpecker Electro and Branch & Blade Song are good alternatives depending on your stats.

What main stats should Starlight Billy use?

Starlight Billy should use Crit Rate on slot 4, Physical DMG Bonus on slot 5, and HP% on slot 6. Crit Rate is especially important because he already gains a large amount of Crit DMG from his kit and common support setups.

What substats are best for Starlight Billy?

The best substats for Starlight Billy are Crit Rate, Crit DMG, HP%, and ATK%. Crit Rate and Crit DMG are the top priority, while HP% is especially useful because of his Rupture and Sheer Force scaling.

What skills should I level first for Starlight Billy?

Level Starlight Billy’s Special Attack first, then Chain Attack, then Basic Attack. Assist and Dodge are useful, but they do not need to be prioritized as highly as his main damage skills.

What is the best team for Starlight Billy?

The best Starlight Billy team is Starlight Billy, Dialyn, and Lucia. If you do not have those units, Ju Fufu and Pan Yinhu can work as strong alternatives for a more accessible Rupture-focused team.

Where can I top up Zenless Zone Zero for Starlight Billy pulls?

Players who need extra Monochrome for Starlight Billy, his W-Engine, or future ZZZ banners can check Topuplist’s Zenless Zone Zero Top-Up page. It offers Monochrome and Inter-Knot Membership options, which can help with last-minute pulls or long-term resource planning.
